title: ジャパンダートダービーの後に・大井魂

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One loses the Japan Dirt Derby, but praises
the strength of the people of Oi, realizing the
true worth of working toward the top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next battle will be the Tokyo Daishoten,
where the top of the regionals will be decided!
